_comment: GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) test set. Paste each question into ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini and check Google AI Overviews once a month. Log whether a WakilBhai page was cited/linked in scripts/geo-log.csv. `target` is the WakilBhai page we want cited. `lang` reflects how a tier-2/3 India user really types (Hinglish included). See scripts/seo-monitor.md for the runbook.
